title: Set Implementation in Java
summary: Set is an interface in Java that represents a collection of unique elements, meaning that no two elements in a set can be the same. Java provides several implementations of Set, each with its own unique features and trade-offs. In this blog post, we will explore the different implementations of Set in Java and their use cases.
